prompt: Show average GPA for different scholarship amount ranges

inputData.question: Show average GPA for different scholarship amount ranges

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Show average GPA for different scholarship amount ranges"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Show average GPA for different scholarship amount ranges"},"startedAt":1771804463440,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"Bucket scholarships by amount, join to students, deduplicate to one student-per-bucket (so a student with multiple scholarships in the same range is counted once), exclude null GPAs from the average, and order buckets deterministically by a bucket_rank.","sql":"WITH student_buckets AS (
  SELECT
    sc.student_id AS student_id,
    CASE
      WHEN sc.amount = 0 THEN '0'
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 1 AND 999 THEN '$1-999'
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 1000 AND 2499 THEN '$1,000-2,499'
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 2500 AND 4999 THEN '$2,500-4,999'
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 5000 AND 9999 THEN '$5,000-9,999'
      ELSE '$10,000+'
    END AS scholarship_range,
    CASE
      WHEN sc.amount = 0 THEN 0
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 1 AND 999 THEN 1
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 1000 AND 2499 THEN 2
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 2500 AND 4999 THEN 3
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 5000 AND 9999 THEN 4
      ELSE 5
    END AS bucket_rank,
    s.gpa AS gpa
  FROM public.scholarships sc
  JOIN public.students s ON sc.student_id = s.id
  GROUP BY
    sc.student_id,
    s.gpa,
    CASE
      WHEN sc.amount = 0 THEN '0'
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 1 AND 999 THEN '$1-999'
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 1000 AND 2499 THEN '$1,000-2,499'
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 2500 AND 4999 THEN '$2,500-4,999'
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 5000 AND 9999 THEN '$5,000-9,999'
      ELSE '$10,000+'
    END,
    CASE
      WHEN sc.amount = 0 THEN 0
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 1 AND 999 THEN 1
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 1000 AND 2499 THEN 2
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 2500 AND 4999 THEN 3
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 5000 AND 9999 THEN 4
      ELSE 5
    END
)
SELECT
  scholarship_range AS scholarship_range,
  ROUND(AVG(gpa)::numeric, 2) AS average_gpa,
  COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) FILTER (WHERE gpa IS NOT NULL) AS student_count
FROM student_buckets
GROUP BY bucket_rank, scholarship_range
ORDER BY bucket_rank;","assumptions":["Scholarship amount ranges/buckets chosen as: 0, 1-999, 1,000-2,499, 2,500-4,999, 5,000-9,999, 10,000+ (adjust if you prefer different bins).","Students with null gpa are excluded from the average and student_count.","A student with multiple scholarships in the same bucket is counted once for that bucket; a student with scholarships in different buckets will appear in each relevant bucket."]},"endedAt":1771804498951},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"WITH student_buckets AS (
  SELECT
    sc.student_id AS student_id,

    END AS bucket_rank,
    s.gpa AS gpa
  FROM public.scholarships sc
  JOIN public.students s ON sc.student_id = s.id
  GROUP BY

title.text: Average GPA by Scholarship Amount Range
title.subtitle: Average GPA and student count for each scholarship range

resultRaw.sql:
WITH student_buckets AS (
  SELECT
    sc.student_id AS student_id,
    CASE
      WHEN sc.amount = 0 THEN '0'
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 1 AND 999 THEN '$1-999'
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 1000 AND 2499 THEN '$1,000-2,499'
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 2500 AND 4999 THEN '$2,500-4,999'
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 5000 AND 9999 THEN '$5,000-9,999'
      ELSE '$10,000+'
    END AS scholarship_range,
    CASE
      WHEN sc.amount = 0 THEN 0
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 1 AND 999 THEN 1
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 1000 AND 2499 THEN 2
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 2500 AND 4999 THEN 3
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 5000 AND 9999 THEN 4
      ELSE 5
    END AS bucket_rank,
    s.gpa AS gpa
  FROM public.scholarships sc
  JOIN public.students s ON sc.student_id = s.id
  GROUP BY
    sc.student_id,
    s.gpa,
    CASE
      WHEN sc.amount = 0 THEN '0'
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 1 AND 999 THEN '$1-999'
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 1000 AND 2499 THEN '$1,000-2,499'
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 2500 AND 4999 THEN '$2,500-4,999'
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 5000 AND 9999 THEN '$5,000-9,999'
      ELSE '$10,000+'
    END,
    CASE
      WHEN sc.amount = 0 THEN 0
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 1 AND 999 THEN 1
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 1000 AND 2499 THEN 2
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 2500 AND 4999 THEN 3
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 5000 AND 9999 THEN 4
      ELSE 5
    END
)
SELECT
  scholarship_range AS scholarship_range,
  ROUND(AVG(gpa)::numeric, 2) AS average_gpa,
  COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) FILTER (WHERE gpa IS NOT NULL) AS student_count
FROM student_buckets
GROUP BY bucket_rank, scholarship_range
ORDER BY bucket_rank;

title.text: Average GPA by Scholarship Amount Range
title.subtitle: Average GPA and student count for each scholarship range

result.sql:
WITH student_buckets AS (
  SELECT
    sc.student_id AS student_id,
    CASE
      WHEN sc.amount = 0 THEN '0'
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 1 AND 999 THEN '$1-999'
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 1000 AND 2499 THEN '$1,000-2,499'
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 2500 AND 4999 THEN '$2,500-4,999'
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 5000 AND 9999 THEN '$5,000-9,999'
      ELSE '$10,000+'
    END AS scholarship_range,
    CASE
      WHEN sc.amount = 0 THEN 0
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 1 AND 999 THEN 1
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 1000 AND 2499 THEN 2
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 2500 AND 4999 THEN 3
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 5000 AND 9999 THEN 4
      ELSE 5
    END AS bucket_rank,
    s.gpa AS gpa
  FROM public.scholarships sc
  JOIN public.students s ON sc.student_id = s.id
  GROUP BY
    sc.student_id,
    s.gpa,
    CASE
      WHEN sc.amount = 0 THEN '0'
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 1 AND 999 THEN '$1-999'
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 1000 AND 2499 THEN '$1,000-2,499'
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 2500 AND 4999 THEN '$2,500-4,999'
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 5000 AND 9999 THEN '$5,000-9,999'
      ELSE '$10,000+'
    END,
    CASE
      WHEN sc.amount = 0 THEN 0
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 1 AND 999 THEN 1
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 1000 AND 2499 THEN 2
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 2500 AND 4999 THEN 3
      WHEN sc.amount BETWEEN 5000 AND 9999 THEN 4
      ELSE 5
    END
)
SELECT
  scholarship_range AS scholarship_range,
  ROUND(AVG(gpa)::numeric, 2) AS average_gpa,
  COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) FILTER (WHERE gpa IS NOT NULL) AS student_count
FROM student_buckets
GROUP BY bucket_rank, scholarship_range
ORDER BY bucket_rank;
